name: hone
description: Score your judgment over AI-assisted work. Every AI eval scores the model; Hone scores you.
long_description: Hone runs the open AI-Q protocol inside your agent: it interviews you about a piece of AI-assisted work, commits your confidence before the reveal, and scores your judgment across the three Ds — Discernment, Delegation, Design — deterministically. Judgment metadata (scores, never your work) stays in a local file on your machine; nothing leaves the session. The host model you already use does the reading and the interview; this server supplies the methodology and the deterministic scoring.

tools.name: get_protocol
tools.description: The AI-Q review methodology for the host model to run (rubric, interview, scoring rigor).

tools.name: score_review
tools.description: Deterministically score a completed interview into an AI-Q (sub-scores + band).

tools.name: record_review
tools.description: Save judgment metadata only — scores, never the work — to the local profile.

tools.name: get_profile
tools.description: The longitudinal local AI-Q profile: averages, weakest dimension, trends.

profile_dir.title: Profile location
profile_dir.description: Where your local AI-Q profile (scores only, never your work) is stored. Defaults to ~/.hone.
